title: Advancement Multiplier Mod
description: Every advancement doubles your drop multiplier. 120 advancements = 4.6 quintillion drops per block.
body:
# Advancement Multiplier

**Every advancement you earn doubles your drops. Permanently.**

Start with 1x. Kill a mob: 2x. Mine stone: 4x. Craft a diamond pickaxe: 8x. By the time you've cleared the End, you're drowning in millions of items per drop. Get all 120 tracked advancements and you hit **4.6 quintillion** multiplier.

---

## How It Works

Each of the **120 tracked advancements** across Adventure, End, Husbandry, Nether, and Story adds one doubling to your multiplier. The math is simple: `2^n` where `n` is your advancement count.

| Advancements | Multiplier |
|:---:|:---:|
| 1 | 2x |
| 5 | 32x |
| 10 | 1,024x |
| 20 | 1.0Mx |
| 30 | 1.1Bx |
| 40 | 1.1Tx |
| 50 | 1.1Qx |
| 62+ | 4.6Qix (max) |

The multiplier applies to **all loot**: mob kills, block breaks, fishing, chest loot, and more. The more advancements you earn, the more absurd it gets.

---

## Features

- **Exponential scaling**: each advancement exactly doubles your multiplier, no diminishing returns
- **Bossbar display**: always-visible multiplier tracker with clean K / M / B / T / Q / Qi formatting
- **Scoreboard integration**: `adv.count` and `multiplier.max` objectives auto-created for datapack use
- **Cascade drop fix**: beds, doors, and tall plants both drop multiplied (the auto-broken half is covered too)
- **Death protection**: your own death drops are never multiplied
- **Relog safe**: stacks survive save/reload via a codec range patch; nothing disappears on world close
- **Resync command**: `/advmultiplier recalculate` to force a full recount if anything desyncs

---

## Tracked Advancements

All **120 vanilla advancements** across five categories are tracked:

- **Adventure**: 46 advancements
- **End**: 8 advancements
- **Husbandry**: 29 advancements
- **Nether**: 22 advancements
- **Story**: 15 advancements (root excluded)

Root advancements (`story/root`, `nether/root`, `end/root`) are intentionally excluded as they grant automatically without player action.

---

## Stack Size

This mod includes the same codec and container stack-size patches as the standalone [Unlimited Stacks Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/unlimited-stacks-mod). If you're using both, they are fully compatible (the patches are identical and Mixin handles deduplication cleanly).

---

## Compatibility

| | |
|---|---|
| **Minecraft** | 26.1.2 |
| **Loader** | Fabric 0.19.2+ |
| **API** | Fabric API required |
| **Side** | Required on both client and server |
| **Java** | 25+ |

---

## For Server Operators

The scoreboard objectives `adv.count` and `multiplier.max` are created automatically on server start. You can reference `multiplier.max` from datapacks or command blocks to read the current multiplier for the `#multiplier` fake player.

The `/advmultiplier recalculate` command recounts all tracked advancements from scratch, useful after `/advancement grant` commands or if a player's score desyncs.
